title: A Resolution approving and adopting the Municipal Development Council (MDC) Resolution No. 2025-07, dated August 15, 2025 entitled "Resolution reprogramming some portions of the 20% Municipal Development Fund CY 2025 Continuing Appropriations amounting to Fourteen Million Nine Hundred Twenty-Two Thousand Ninety-Nine Pesos and 48/100 (Php 14,922,099.48) for various purposes and approving the same."
